mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS momentum is rising.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in more than 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate crossing above its recent range signals weakening labor income and recession risk, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 5.5% or rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the conditional mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer inflation is accelerating while the federal funds rate is already elevated, equity valuations face both margin pressure and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS is above 3%
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-rate trigger does not produce lower 60-day returns than either proxy alone in walk-forward tests, or if interaction coefficient is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding real output and improved operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when INDPRO momentum is positive.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by below-median 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in housing starts signals weaker construction activity and interest-sensitive demand, reducing expectations for cyclical earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST contraction triggers are not followed by negative excess 60-day S&P 500 returns versus non-triggered periods in at least 55% of walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with a stable or falling unemployment rate signals resilient aggregate income and lower near-term recession probability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth crosses above 0.3% while UNRATE does not rise over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS and UNRATE joint signal has a non-positive average 5-day S&P 500 return or fails to outperform PAYEMS-only signals in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if rising FEDFUNDS triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the estimated return slope on FEDFUNDS changes is non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity strength across GDP and retail sales signals broad demand growth, improving expected cash flows and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when both series trend upward.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses above 0% while RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 and RSAFS expansion trigger does not deliver above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of triggered observations.
